---
title: "Weather Forecast"
author: "Faith Lucy Kirabo"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
# Load raw, no mutations, no filtering
train_raw <- read_csv("~/Downloads/ercot_full_dataset_2018_2025-2.csv",
                      show_col_types = FALSE)

# Basic structure
cat("Total rows:", nrow(train_raw), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(train_raw), "\n")
cat("Datetime class:", class(train_raw$datetime), "\n")

# Raw datetime values, first and last 5
cat("\nFirst 5 datetime values (raw):\n")
print(head(train_raw$datetime, 5))
cat("\nLast 5 datetime values (raw):\n")
print(tail(train_raw$datetime, 5))

# Row counts per year
cat("\nRows per year:\n")
train_raw %>%
  mutate(year = str_sub(as.character(datetime), 1, 4)) %>%
  count(year) %>%
  print()

# Any NAs in datetime
cat("\nNA datetimes:", sum(is.na(train_raw$datetime)), "\n")

# Check for duplicate datetimes
cat("Duplicate datetimes:", sum(duplicated(train_raw$datetime)), "\n")
```
```{r}
# Filter to training window only (2018-2023)
train <- train_raw %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2018-01-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC") &
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2023-12-31 23:00:00", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  arrange(datetime)

cat("Date range:", format(min(train$datetime)), "to", format(max(train$datetime)), "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(train), "\n")

# Confirm rows per year
train %>%
  mutate(year = year(datetime)) %>%
  count(year)

# Find the exact missing hours per year
full_sequence <- tibble(
  datetime = seq(as.POSIXct("2018-01-01 01:00:00", tz = "UTC"),
                 as.POSIXct("2023-12-31 23:00:00", tz = "UTC"),
                 by = "hour")
)

missing_hours <- full_sequence %>%
  anti_join(train, by = "datetime")

cat("\nMissing hours:", nrow(missing_hours), "\n")
print(missing_hours)
```

```{r}
cat("Date range:", format(min(train$datetime)), "to", format(max(train$datetime)), "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(train), "| Expect 52,584 for 2018-2025\n")
cat("Class:", class(train$datetime), "\n")

cat("First 5 raw values:\n")
print(head(train$datetime, 5))

cat("Any NAs in datetime?", sum(is.na(train$datetime)), "\n")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(train), "\n")
```
```{r}
# Gap check
gaps <- train %>%
  mutate(gap = as.numeric(difftime(datetime, lag(datetime), units = "hours"))) %>%
  filter(gap != 1 & !is.na(gap))

cat("Gaps found:", nrow(gaps), "\n")
print(head(gaps %>% select(datetime, gap), 10))
```

```{r}
# Define weather variables to forecast
zones <- c("COAST", "EAST", "FWEST", "NCENT", "NORTH", "SCENT", "SOUTH", "WEST")

weather_vars <- c(
  paste0(zones, "_temperature_f"),
  paste0(zones, "_relative_humidity_pct"),
  paste0(zones, "_wind_speed_mph"),
  paste0(zones, "_solar_radiation_wm2")
)

h <- 8784 #2024
```

### Prediction Function
```{r}
# STL + SARIMA forecast
# forecast daily with STL+ARIMA, then reattach hourly profile
forecast_weather_series <- function(col_name, data, horizon_hours = 8760) {
  
  series <- data %>%
    select(datetime, value = all_of(col_name)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(value))
  
  # mean per day
  daily <- series %>%
    mutate(date = as_date(datetime)) %>%
    group_by(date) %>%
    summarise(daily_mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  monthly_mean <- series %>%
    mutate(month = month(datetime)) %>%
    group_by(month) %>%
    summarise(monthly_mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  hourly_profile <- series %>%
    mutate(month = month(datetime), hour = hour(datetime)) %>%
    group_by(month, hour) %>%
    summarise(profile_offset = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(monthly_mean, by = "month") %>%
    mutate(delta = profile_offset - monthly_mean)
  
  # msts (weekly and annual seasonality)
  daily_ts <- msts(daily$daily_mean, seasonal.periods = c(7,365.25)) #weekly, leap and non leap
  
  #stl_fit  <- mstl(daily_ts, robust = TRUE)
  #horizon_days <- ceiling(horizon_hours / 24)
  #daily_fc <- forecast(stl_fit, h = horizon_days, method = "ets")
  horizon_days <- ceiling(horizon_hours / 24)
  daily_fc     <- stlf(daily_ts, h = horizon_days, method = "arima", robust = TRUE)
  # Reconstruct hourly forecasts
  
  last_date <- max(daily$date)
  
  future_hourly <- tibble(
    datetime = seq(as.POSIXct(last_date + days(1), tz = "UTC"), 
                   by = "hour", 
                   length.out = horizon_hours)
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      date  = as_date(datetime),
      month = month(datetime),
      hour  = hour(datetime),
      day_index = as.integer(date - last_date)
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      tibble(day_index = 1:horizon_days, 
             daily_fc_mean = as.numeric(daily_fc$mean)),
      by = "day_index"
    ) %>%
    left_join(hourly_profile %>% select(month, hour, delta), 
              by = c("month", "hour")) %>%
    mutate(
      forecast = daily_fc_mean + replace_na(delta, 0),
      # hard floor for solar radiation (can't be negative)
      forecast = if_else(str_detect(col_name, "solar") & forecast < 0, 0, forecast)
    )
  
  future_hourly %>% select(datetime, forecast) %>% rename(!!col_name := forecast)
}
```

```{r}
# Run for all 32 series
weather_forecasts_2024 <- map(weather_vars, function(v) {
  cat("-", v, "\n")
  forecast_weather_series(v, train, horizon_hours = h)
}) %>%
  reduce(left_join, by = "datetime")
```

```{r}
# actual 2024 weather
weather_actual_2024 <- train_raw %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2024-01-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC") &
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2024-12-31 23:00:00", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  select(datetime, all_of(weather_vars))
```

### Assess model accuracy and finetune
```{r}
# Compute metrics for all 32 series
weather_metrics <- map_dfr(weather_vars, function(v) {
  pred   <- weather_forecasts_2024[[v]]
  actual <- weather_actual_2024[[v]]
  
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    MAE      = mean(abs(pred - actual), na.rm = TRUE),
    RMSE     = sqrt(mean((pred - actual)^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    MAPE     = mean(abs((pred - actual) / actual) * 100, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
})

print(weather_metrics, n= 32)
```

# Investigating COAST prediction poor performance
```{r}
# COAST temperature predicted vs actual
coast_comparison <- weather_forecasts_2024 %>%
  select(datetime, pred = COAST_temperature_f) %>%
  inner_join(
    weather_actual_2024 %>% select(datetime, actual = COAST_temperature_f),
    by = "datetime"
  ) %>%
  mutate(month = month(datetime),
         error = pred - actual)

# Error by month
coast_comparison %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(MAE = mean(abs(error)), bias = mean(error)) %>%
  print()
```

### Forecast 2025 using 2018-2024
```{r}
# 2018-2024 training data
weather_train_final <- train_raw %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2018-01-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC") &
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2024-12-31 23:00:00", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  arrange(datetime)

cat("Final weather train rows:", nrow(weather_train_final), "| Expected: 61,368\n")

# 2025 8760 hours
h_2025 <- 8760

weather_forecasts_2025 <- map(weather_vars, function(v) {
  cat( v, "\n")
  forecast_weather_series(v, weather_train_final, horizon_hours = h_2025)
}) %>%
  reduce(left_join, by = "datetime")

cat("Rows:", nrow(weather_forecasts_2025), "| Expected: 8760\n")
```

```{r}
weather_forecasts_2025 <- weather_forecasts_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    # Datetime features
    hour        = hour(datetime),
    day_of_week = wday(datetime, week_start = 1) - 1,  # 0=Mon, 6=Sun
    month       = month(datetime),
    year        = year(datetime),
    is_weekend  = if_else(day_of_week >= 5, 1, 0),
    
    # Cyclical encodings
    hour_sin    = sin(2 * pi * hour / 24),
    hour_cos    = cos(2 * pi * hour / 24),
    month_sin   = sin(2 * pi * month / 12),
    month_cos   = cos(2 * pi * month / 12),
    dow_sin     = sin(2 * pi * day_of_week / 7),
    dow_cos     = cos(2 * pi * day_of_week / 7),
    
    # Holidays (Texas public holidays)
    is_holiday  = if_else(as_date(datetime) %in% as_date(c(
      "2025-01-01", "2025-01-20", "2025-02-17", "2025-05-26",
      "2025-06-19", "2025-07-04", "2025-09-01", "2025-11-11",
      "2025-11-27", "2025-12-25"
    )), 1, 0)
  )

# Heat index (derived from forecasted temp + humidity)
compute_heat_index <- function(temp_f, rh) {
  hi <- -42.379 +
        (2.04901523  * temp_f) +
        (10.14333127 * rh) +
        (-0.22475541 * temp_f * rh) +
        (-0.00683783 * temp_f^2) +
        (-0.05481717 * rh^2) +
        (0.00122874  * temp_f^2 * rh) +
        (0.00085282  * temp_f * rh^2) +
        (-0.00000199 * temp_f^2 * rh^2)
  if_else(temp_f >= 80, hi, temp_f)
}

for (zone in zones) {
  weather_forecasts_2025 <- weather_forecasts_2025 %>%
    mutate(!!paste0(zone, "_heat_index_f") := compute_heat_index(
      .data[[paste0(zone, "_temperature_f")]],
      .data[[paste0(zone, "_relative_humidity_pct")]]
    ))
}

# Temperature lag (lag_24h from forecasted temps) 
# Use last 24 hours of 2024 actual data as seed for lag
temp_seed <- weather_train_final %>%
  arrange(datetime) %>%
  tail(24) %>%
  select(datetime, all_of(paste0(zones, "_temperature_f")))

# Compute temp_lag_24h — for 2025 this is the previous hour's temperature
weather_forecasts_2025 <- weather_forecasts_2025 %>%
  mutate(temp_lag_24h = lag(COAST_temperature_f, 24))
# Note: first 24 rows will be NA — fill from seed
weather_forecasts_2025$temp_lag_24h[1:24] <- temp_seed$COAST_temperature_f
```


```{r}
write_csv(weather_forecasts_2025,
          "~/Desktop/MSADS Courses/Time Series/Final_Project/data/test_ercot_weather_forecasts_2025.csv")
cat("Rows:", nrow(weather_forecasts), "| Cols:", ncol(weather_forecasts), "\n")
```
